source.title: Heimao (黑猫投诉) - Pinduoduo Complaint Data via WebSearch

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo cumulative complaints on Heimao exceed 1 million
extractions.evidence: Pinduoduo accumulated over 1,004,841 complaints on Heimao, of which only 119,620 were marked 'completed' (11.9% resolution rate).

verification.verifier_notes: Data from Leju Finance reporting on Heimao platform data. Heimao scraper failed due to anti-scraping; data collected via WebSearch of published Heimao reports.

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo receives approximately 767 complaints per day on Heimao
extractions.evidence: In the most recent 30-day period, there were 22,998 complaints with only 847 completed — approximately 766.6 complaints/day and a completion rate of just 3.68%.

verification.verifier_notes: Source: Leju Finance analysis of Heimao data

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo reply rate on Heimao is only 20%
extractions.evidence: Among top e-commerce platforms, Pinduoduo replied to only 20% of complaints, while JD.com, Douyin, Dewu, and Kuaishou all achieved 100% reply rates. Taobao (incl Tmall) replied to just 5%.

verification.verifier_notes: Source: Heimao 2024 annual e-commerce complaint report (黑猫投诉2024年电商投诉数据报告)

extractions.claim: 2024 total e-commerce complaints on Heimao exceeded 1.28 million, up 21.5% YoY
extractions.evidence: 2024 Heimao platform e-commerce complaints totaled 1.28M+ valid complaints, a 21.51% increase from 2023. PDD, Taobao, JD, Douyin accounted for 83.3% of all complaints.

extractions.claim: Top complaint themes: customer service (40%), goods not matching (15%), refund issues (15%)
extractions.evidence: Customer service problems accounted for over 40% of all e-commerce complaints, followed by goods not matching descriptions (~15%) and refund refusals (~15%).

extractions.claim: December 2025: Pinduoduo ranked #2 in monthly complaint volume
extractions.evidence: December 2025 e-commerce complaints totaled 134,798 (-9.43% MoM). Top 3 by volume: Douyin, Pinduoduo, Taobao. Pinduoduo reply rate improved vs prior month.
